0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Plugin System"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Extensible plugin architecture for custom memory behavior."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Creating a Plugin"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.core.plugins import MnemosynePlugin\n\nclass AuditPlugin(MnemosynePlugin):\n  name = \"audit-logger\"\n  \n  def on_remember(self, memory_id, content, **kwargs):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Stored: {memory_id}\")\n  \n  def on_recall(self, query, results, **kwargs):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Recall: {query} -> {len(results)} results\")\n      return results\n  \n  def on_consolidate(self, count, **kwargs):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Consolidated: {count}\")\n  \n  def on_invalidate(self, memory_id, **kwargs):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Invalidated: {memory_id}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Registering"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"mem = Mnemosyne()\n\nmem.plugin_manager.register(AuditPlugin())\nmem.plugin_manager.discover(\"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/\")\nplugins = mem.plugin_manager.list_plugins()\nmem.plugin_manager.unregister(\"audit-logger\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Built-in Plugins"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Plugin"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Logs all operations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Tracks counts and latencies"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Filters by custom criteria"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Auto-Discovery"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Drop Python files into
